release.name: n8n@2.15.1
release.body:
## [2.15.1](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/compare/n8n@2.15.0...n8n@2.15.1) (2026-04-10)


### Bug Fixes

* **Google Drive Node:** Fix infinite pagination loop in v1 API request ([#28268](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/28268)) ([4d91dff](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/4d91dffbaaefe8cf11448f3b4baade5704f2ef2c))

items.rawText: **Google Drive Node:** Fix infinite pagination loop in v1 API request ([#28268](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/28268)) ([4d91dff](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/4d91dffbaaefe8cf11448f3b4baade5704f2ef2c))
